/usr/bin/c++ "-Wl,-rpath,'\$$ORIGIN/..'" CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/app/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/app/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/app/UVCScanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/video/MockVideoSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/video/UvcExtensionUnit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/video/V4l2VideoSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/sensor/MockHidSensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Insight_Viewer.dir/src/sensor/HidapiSensor.cpp.o -o Insight_Viewer   -L/home/lean/digua/uvc-viewer-Linux  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lean/digua/uvc-viewer-Linux /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 third_party/imgui/libimgui.a -lhidapi-hidraw -lturbojpeg -linsight9 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
